title: pelargonium tectum
intro: Pelargonium tectum, also known as the Cape Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family, native to South Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium tectum include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to make cough syrups and other medicinal remedies.
